rooms.name: Eldermoor Town Square
rooms.description: Cobblestones worn smooth by centuries of foot traffic. A fountain burbles at the center, and the smell of fresh bread drifts from the bakery to the east. Adventurers gather here before venturing into the wilds.

rooms.name: North Gate of Eldermoor
rooms.description: Massive oak doors reinforced with iron bands stand open. Guards in polished mail scan the roads north and east.

rooms.name: Marta's Bakery
rooms.description: Warmth and the scent of cinnamon rolls fill this cozy shop. Shelves display loaves of crusty bread and pastries glistening with honey.

rooms.name: The Gilded Tankard
rooms.description: Dim lantern light, rough-hewn tables, and the clink of tankards. Bards swap tales of distant dungeons while mercenaries sharpen their blades.

rooms.name: Edge of the Whispering Woods
rooms.description: Ancient oaks loom overhead, their leaves murmuring secrets in the wind. The town lies north; deeper woods beckon south.

rooms.name: Forest Path
rooms.description: A narrow trail winds between moss-covered boulders. Ferns brush your ankles as birds call from the canopy above.

rooms.name: Heart of the Whispering Woods
rooms.description: Sunlight barely penetrates the dense canopy. Gnarled roots twist across the forest floor. Something watches from the shadows.

rooms.name: Moonlit Clearing
rooms.description: A circle of pale stones stands in a sun-dappled clearing. Wildflowers bloom between the ancient monoliths.

rooms.name: Goblin Camp
rooms.description: Crude tents of stitched hide surround a crackling fire. Weapons and stolen goods are piled haphazardly. The goblin chief's throne of bones dominates the clearing.

rooms.name: Abandoned Shrine
rooms.description: Crumbling stone pillars frame a moss-choked altar. Faded murals depict heroes of a forgotten age. A locked iron door is set into the hillside.

rooms.name: Crypt Stairs
rooms.description: Slippery steps descend into oppressive darkness. The air smells of dust and decay.

rooms.name: Hall of Forgotten Kings
rooms.description: Sarcophagi line the walls. Faded tapestries depict a kingdom lost to time.

rooms.name: Tomb of the Lich King
rooms.description: A throne of bone dominates the chamber. The Lich King rises at your intrusion.

rooms.name: Adventurers' Guild Hall
rooms.description: Trophies and wanted posters adorn the walls. Heroes gather here to form guilds.

rooms.name: Shrine Vault
rooms.description: Torchlight flickers off walls lined with dusty reliquaries. A spectral guardian materializes from the darkness.

rooms.name: Ironspine Foothills
rooms.description: Wind howls across scree slopes. The Eldermoor gate lies west; a rocky trail climbs north into the Ironspine Mountains.

rooms.name: Rocky Mountain Trail
rooms.description: A treacherous path hugs the cliff face. Eagles circle overhead. The air grows thin and cold.

rooms.name: Bandit Hideout
rooms.description: Smoke rises from a concealed cave mouth. Rough voices argue over plunder within.

rooms.name: Bridge of Ash
rooms.description: A rotting rope bridge spans a chasm reeking of sulfur. Something massive stirs in the cavern beyond.

rooms.name: Crystal Cavern
rooms.description: Luminescent crystals jut from every surface. Arcane energy crackles in the air. This place feels ancient and dangerous.

mobs.name: Goblin Scout
mobs.description: A wiry green creature with beady red eyes, clutching a crude dagger.

mobs.name: Forest Wolf
mobs.description: A lean predator with matted grey fur and yellow fangs bared in a snarl.

mobs.name: Goblin Warrior
mobs.description: A muscular goblin in scavenged plate armor, wielding a notched axe.

mobs.name: Goblin Chief Grak
mobs.description: A hulking goblin lord crowned with a jagged iron circlet, scars mapping a violent reign.

mobs.name: Shade Sentinel
mobs.description: A translucent wraith bound to guard the vault, its hollow eyes burning with cold light.

mobs.name: Hill Bandit
mobs.description: A scarred outlaw in furs, bow drawn and greed in their eyes.

mobs.name: Mountain Wolf
mobs.description: A thick-furred predator adapted to thin mountain air.

mobs.name: Bandit Chief Vex
mobs.description: A cunning rogue lord with twin daggers and a cruel smirk.

mobs.name: Cave Troll
mobs.description: A lumbering brute with stone-grey skin and fists like boulders.

mobs.name: Crystal Golem
mobs.description: A towering construct of living crystal, humming with arcane power.

mobs.name: Crypt Skeleton
mobs.description: Bones animated by lingering malice, clad in tarnished armor.

mobs.name: Crypt Warden
mobs.description: An armored sentinel wreathed in pale flame.

mobs.name: Malachar the Lich King
mobs.description: A skeletal monarch crowned with a halo of dark magic.

npcs.name: Captain Aldric
npcs.description: A grizzled veteran in battered plate, his cape bearing the crest of Eldermoor.
npcs.greeting: Hail, adventurer. Goblins plague the Whispering Woods — bring me proof of their demise and I'll reward you handsomely.

npcs.name: Marta the Baker
npcs.description: A stout woman with flour-dusted apron and a warm, welcoming smile.
npcs.greeting: Welcome! Fresh bread and potions for weary travelers. Type 'buy health_potion' to purchase.

npcs.name: Innkeeper Bram
npcs.description: A broad-shouldered man polishing a tankard, his laugh echoing off the rafters.
npcs.greeting: Pull up a chair, friend. Rest here and you'll recover HP over time. Type 'rest' to sit awhile.

npcs.name: Greta the Smith
npcs.description: A muscular smith with soot-streaked arms, hammer ringing on the anvil.
npcs.greeting: Need gear forged? I craft leather armor from wolf pelts and iron swords from goblin trophies. Type 'craft' to see recipes.

quests.name: The Goblin Menace
quests.description: Captain Aldric wants proof that the goblin threat in the Whispering Woods is being dealt with.

quests.name: Wolf Hunt
quests.description: The forest wolves grow bold. Thin their numbers and bring back pelts.

quests.name: Mountain Menace
quests.description: Bandits harass travelers in the Ironspine foothills. Captain Aldric wants their leader dealt with.
